calc_traces.title: Procurement timing basis
calc_traces.formula: Procurement timing uses package-family lead times and import content to distribute CAPEX draws across advance, fabrication, delivery, erection, and retention milestones.

calc_traces.title: Import-duty burden by equipment class
calc_traces.formula: Total import duty = sum(bare equipment cost * import content fraction * import-duty fraction) across procurement package families.

calc_traces.title: Annual OPEX
calc_traces.formula: OPEX = RM + utilities + labor + maintenance + overheads

calc_traces.title: Selected utility-train CAPEX
calc_traces.formula: CAPEX = sum(installed cost of selected utility-train items)

calc_traces.title: Transport-limited utility penalties
calc_traces.formula: Penalty utilities = absorber hydraulic electricity + solids auxiliaries + dryer endpoint steam

calc_traces.title: Utility island economic basis
calc_traces.formula: Island economics allocate selected utility-train CAPEX and utility burden across selected utility islands, then add island-specific service costs.

calc_traces.title: Absorber packing replacement basis
calc_traces.formula: Annual packing replacement = packing inventory * replacement fraction / replacement cycle

calc_traces.title: Classifier recurring service basis
calc_traces.formula: Classifier service = f(slurry circulation, cut size, classification sharpness)

calc_traces.title: Filter media replacement basis
calc_traces.formula: Filter media replacement = f(filter area, cake resistance, medium resistance)

calc_traces.title: Dryer exhaust treatment basis
calc_traces.formula: Dryer exhaust treatment = f(dry-air flow, humidity lift, exhaust saturation)

calc_traces.title: Recurring transport/service submodel total
calc_traces.formula: Transport/service = packing replacement + classifier service + filter media replacement + dryer exhaust treatment

calc_traces.title: Availability policy basis
calc_traces.formula: Route-family outage policy defines minor outages, turnaround window, startup loss, and turnaround interval
